# Poisoned Darts

> [!note] 📖 Attachment · Cost: **0** · Lore

*Trap. Wose.*

---

Play Poisoned Darts into the staging area unattached.
If unattached, attach Poisoned Darts to the next eligible enemy that enters the staging area.
**Response**: When the attached enemy would take any amount of damage, increase that amount by 1.
